Package in.co.rays.proj4.controller

package in.co.rays.proj4.controller
  • Class
    Description
    BaseCtl
    BaseCtl is an abstract base controller class that extends HttpServlet.
    ChangePasswordCtl
    ChangePasswordCtl is a Controller class that handles the Change Password functionality for logged-in users.
    CollegeCtl
     
    CollegeListCtl
    CollegeListCtl Servlet handles the operations of displaying, searching, paginating and deleting College records.
    CourseCtl
    Controller to handle Course operations such as add, update and display.
    CourseListCtl
    CourseListCtl handles listing, searching, pagination, and deletion of Course records.
    ForgetPasswordCtl
    Forget Password Controller.
    FrontControler
     
    GetMarksheetCtl
    Controller to fetch a Marksheet using Roll Number.
